main.description: Fetch a single record's value from a permissioned repo. Requires a covering OAuth scope or a space credential; implemented by a repo host.

space.description: Permissioned space URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}. Not a standard at-uri.

did.description: The DID of the repo's author.

collection.description: The NSID of the record collection.

cid.description: The CID of the version of the record. If not specified, then return the most recent version.

uri.description: Permissioned record URI, in the form at://{authority}/space/{spaceType}/{skey}/{authorDid}/{collection}/{rkey}. Not a standard at-uri.
